basic_details.job_title: Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade-III
basic_details.short_information: Nuapada District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade-III Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website Nuapada District Court. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the Nuapada District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade-III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per relevant Act, Rules, Orders or instructions issued by the competent authority/Government.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from recognized Institute, Passed Odia at M.E. standard, Good character and sound health
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Grade-III: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized Institute. Passed Odia at M.E. standard.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist & Junior Typist: Rs. 19,900-63,200/- (Level-4 of the Pay Matrix) Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500-81,100/- (Level-7 of the Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Written Examination Computer Science Test (Practical) Skill Test / Shorthand & Typewriting Test Viva-voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nuapada District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nuapada.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026 is 17 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts?
faq.answer: There are 12 vacancies available for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post in the Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts under Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026 is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Stenographer Grade-III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Stenographer Grade-III post is 42 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Junior Typist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Typist post is Level-4 of the Pay Matrix, which ranges from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection stages for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, Computer Science Test (Practical), Skill Test / Shorthand & Typewriting Test, and a Viva-voce Test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the educational qualification required for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and possess a Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute.

faq.question: Q9. How can I get the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Nuapada District Court: https://nuapada.dcourts.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the filled application form?
faq.answer: The filled application form should be sent to the address mentioned in the official notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed therein.
